summary: Iteration 72 - Member Creation with PIN and Hectares Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Login flow works, Members page shows activation stats, Add Member modal includes mandatory PIN (4 digits) and optional Hectares fields, Success dialog displays auto-generated code_planteur (GL-COO-XXXXX format) and PIN status badge.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings for select/option elements - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: cooperative_members.py: PIN code is MANDATORY - returns 422 if missing (Pydantic validation) or 400 if invalid format (not 4 digits or non-numeric)
cooperative_members.py: hectares field stored as hectares_approx in member document
cooperative_members.py: POST /api/cooperative/members returns code_planteur and pin_configured=true on success
cooperative_members.py: GET /api/cooperative/members/activation-stats returns comprehensive stats including pin_configured_count, code_planteur_count
cooperative_members.py: GET /api/cooperative/members returns members with pin_configured and code_planteur fields
cooperative_members.py: GET /api/cooperative/members/export?format=xlsx returns valid Excel file
MembersPage.jsx: Add member modal has REQUIRED PIN field with 4-digit validation and hectares field
MembersPage.jsx: Success dialog shows code_planteur prominently and PIN status badge
MembersPage.jsx: Activation stats banner shows Total, Activés, Non activés, PIN USSD counts and activation rate
seed_data_creation: Test members created during testing with unique phone numbers (+2250700XXXXXX format)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Member creation with PIN and hectares fully working: 1) POST /api/cooperative/members requires PIN (4 digits) - returns 422 if missing, 400 if invalid. 2) Member created with auto-generated code_planteur (GL-XXX-NNNNN format), hashed PIN, and hectares_approx. 3) ussd_registrations entry created for USSD recognition. 4) GET /api/cooperative/members/activation-stats returns stats with pin_configured_count and code_planteur_count. 5) GET /api/cooperative/members returns members with pin_configured and code_planteur fields. 6) GET /api/cooperative/members/export?format=xlsx returns valid Excel file. 7) Frontend Add Member modal has PIN and hectares fields with validation. 8) Success dialog shows code_planteur and PIN status. Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.

mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent
